task_completion.description: Navigate to the campaign modification page for 'AMD_OPTIM'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the campaign settings or modification page open in a web browser, with the campaign ID 'AMD_OPTIM' clearly visible as the active campaign being edited.

task_completion.description: Set the Routing Extension to enable AMD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the 'Routing Extension' field (or equivalent AMD routing field) populated with the value '8369'.

task_completion.description: Set the AMD Send to VM Extension
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the 'AMD Send to VM Extension' field populated with the value '8320'.
The VLM should see the 'AMD Initial Silence' field populated with the value '3500'.

task_completion.description: Set the AMD Maximum Word Length
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the 'AMD Maximum Word Length' field populated with the value '2000'.
The VLM should see the 'AMD Maximum Greeting' field populated with the value '4000'.
The VLM should see a 'Submit' or 'Save Changes' button being clicked, or a success message indicating that the campaign settings have been successfully updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with a web browser interface, not terminal commands, SQL queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual dialer administration system
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a genuine call center administration panel (e.g., Vicidial), not a text editor, a generic form, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were applied to the correct campaign
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings must be entered on the page specifically designated for the 'AMD_OPTIM' campaign, not a global settings page or a different campaign.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign: 'AMD_OPTIM'. Required Configuration: Routing Extension = 8369, AMD Send to VM Extension = 8320, AMD Initial Silence = 3500, AMD Maximum Word Length = 2000, AMD Maximum Greeting = 4000.
